top3.sql:
SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT > 40  -- Assuming normal range for GPT (ALT) is up to 40 U/L; adjust if needed
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT > (SELECT MAX(GPT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GPT IS NOT NULL) * 0.01 -- Approximation for 'beyond normal range' since no explicit normal values provided
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT > 40  -- Assuming normal range for GPT (ALT) is up to 40 U/L; adjust if needed
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT > (SELECT MAX(GPT) FROM Laboratory WHERE GPT IS NOT NULL) * 0.01 -- Approximation for 'beyond normal range' since no explicit normal values provided
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT > 40
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GPT > 40
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC;
